name: SSH Brute Force Block
description: Triggered by Wazuh rule 5720 (SSH brute force). Creates TheHive case and blocks source IP via UFW active response.

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.description: Receives Wazuh SSH brute force alert

nodes.name: Classify source IP
nodes.description: Check if source IP is internal (10.0.x.x) or external

nodes.name: Create TheHive Alert
nodes.description: Create case with attacker IP and targeted user

body.title: SSH Brute Force from ${src_ip}

nodes.name: Block IP via Wazuh Active Response
nodes.description: Trigger firewall-drop active response on the affected agent to block source IP
